allow:
Bash(python3 -c "
import subprocess
subprocess.run\(['pip', 'install', 'openpyxl'], capture_output=True\)
import openpyxl
from openpyxl.utils import get_column_letter

wb = openpyxl.load_workbook\('LPG AI & Automation Internship- Case Study \(data\).xlsx', read_only=True, data_only=True\)
ws = wb.active

print\('=== ALL HEADERS \(Row 1\) ==='\)
row1 = next\(ws.iter_rows\(min_row=1, max_row=1, values_only=True\)\)
headers = []
for i, h in enumerate\(row1\):
    col_letter = get_column_letter\(i+1\)
    headers.append\(\(col_letter, i+1, h\)\)
    print\(f'{col_letter} \(col {i+1}\): {repr\(h\)}'\)

print\(\)
print\('=== ROWS 2-4 \(Raw Values\) ==='\)
rows = ws.iter_rows\(min_row=2, max_row=4, values_only=True\)
for row_num, row in enumerate\(rows, start=2\):
    print\(f'--- Row {row_num} ---'\)
    for i, val in enumerate\(row\):
        col_letter = get_column_letter\(i+1\)
        print\(f'  {col_letter}: {repr\(val\)}'\)

print\(\)
print\('=== KEYWORD SEARCH IN HEADERS ==='\)
keywords = ['rent', 'vacanc', 'unit', 'tax', 'dm', 'name', 'property', 'existing', 'studio', '1bd', '2bd', '3bd', '4bd', 'bed']
for kw in keywords:
    matches = [\(col, num, h\) for col, num, h in headers if h and kw.lower\(\) in str\(h\).lower\(\)]
    if matches:
        print\(f'Keyword \\"{kw}\\":'\)
        for col, num, h in matches:
            print\(f'  {col} \(col {num}\): {repr\(h\)}'\)
")
